GHSA-PCVX-PH33-R5VV.8d73954bf7e13a352e71a32cf7d18905577f17e8: Restored check that was removed by accident in the GHSA-pcvx-ph33-r5vv patch.

GHSA-RW6C-XP26-225V.7284564901441ddb04dadaad306e9f0fb527d71f: Properly escape the strings that are written as raw html (https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick/security/advisories/GHSA-rw6c-xp26-225v)

GHSA-3J4X-RWRX-XXJ9.06a0867c1f5076b85577b6b1cf87af901f6d6a84: Write after we have checked if the realloc failed (https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick/security/advisories/GHSA-3j4x-rwrx-xxj9)

GHSA-R99P-5442-Q2X2.958ca384aa84ca48fbe3af07bb8d1708ab4d6143: Corrected type to avoid an overflow (https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick/security/advisories/GHSA-r99p-5442-q2x2)

GHSA-6J5F-24FW-PQP4.5e28bb254210580ac12234cc9ba4ae57c193129c: Added extra check to prevent out of bounds heap write on 32-bit systems (https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick/security/advisories/GHSA-6j5f-24fw-pqp4)
